channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tablets/ Medication under tree, 14th July
item.description:
9758120 Apparently fixed . Medication dumped under the tree at the corner of Chandler Way and diamond street. Its still there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Location ///swing.combining.part flytipping, 14th July
item.description:
Location ///swing.combining.part Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 14th July
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Voi bike dumped entrance to my property, 14th July
item.description:
An e-bike has been dumped across the steps up to my property on a private driveway, blocking both my access and the house below. I moved it with great difficulty - they’re heavy and the wheels can’t be moved without paying, but there’s no where appropriate for them to be - no storage space that doesn’t block the paths. I’m injured today, had I been yesterday I would not have been able to move it. They need to agree appropriate parking zones or be disallowed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car on Sycamore Avenue, DA15, 14th July
item.description:
This vehicle was previously reported on report ref 9476141. The car remains abandoned on Sycamore Avenue and is not fit to drive due to damaged wheels and interior. The car has been left abandoned in this position for 6 months and is causing obstruction to local residents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Lime Grove, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter and rubbish, 14th July
item.description:
Again the same issue as reported previously. It was not fixed as per your update. Can you please ensure proper cleaning including sweeping?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wallis Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch into the street, 14th July
item.description:
Some branch has fallen into the maiden lane affecting the traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This sign has been reported several times and still not removed, 14th July
item.description:
This has been here for weeks and there’s been several reports of it but the council haven’t done anything

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dockless e-bikes being left outside Manor House station, Green Lanes, 14th July
item.description:
Multiple complaints from residents and business owners about dockless e-bikes being left outside Manor House station, Green Lanes (316 Green Lanes, N4 1BX)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lanes, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People putting their rubbish in the street, 14th July
item.description:
There is a household on Mount pleasant lane dumping their rubbish onto Alcester crescent.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alcester Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds need sorting, 14th July
item.description:
Pavements in Hawthorne crescent are not being weeded although taken over by Greenwich council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 36 Platt's Lane, 14th July
item.description:
Strret lamp needs directional shield as the light pours into bedrooms at the front of the property. Your list doesnt include light pollution.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Platt's Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags and other household waste dumped beside the charity donation bin on the public pavement., 14th July
item.description:
Repeated fly-tipping of household and mixed waste adjacent to the charity donation bin outside Bermondsey Arts Club. Waste has been dumped on the public pavement, creating an obstruction and affecting the surrounding area. This is an ongoing issue at this location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty sign, 14th July
item.description:
This sign has been dirty for a long time and is becoming unreadable

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DUMPED BAGS ON THE FOOTPATH CORNER OF halcot avenue, 14th July
item.description:
Resident reporting there is a Sainsbury on one side of the pavement and another bag with toys box inside on the the other side. It is blocking the access to pedestrians on the footpath. Please could someone look into getting these picked up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halcot Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 14th July
item.description:
Chronic problem all along Glasshouse fields. Residents of n75 dump masses of rubbish outside their block. Please investigate. This is on ongoing and chronic problem that is impacting our street daily

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in car access alley behind houses in Brook Street Erith. Behind houses 196 - 230 nos 1house, 14th July
item.description:
Access to this alley is between 198 and 196. Turning left there is evidence of recent garden works and the rubble from this has been spread along the alley. Walking further along there is almost a flytippers haven. I reported some limited rubbish back in April 24 and this has now been added to hugely.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collindale Avenue, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders creating mess, 14th July
item.description:
Mess left behind and not taken care of

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no. 43 Gayton Road NW3, 14th July
item.description:
The bike lock is cutting into the tree bark all the way round. The bike has not been moved for 3 years and is abandoned. The bike lock is heavy duty and will need a proper heavy duty bolt cutter to remove it. This needs to be done as soon as possible before it does permanent damage to this young tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gayton Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous parking on yellow lines, 14th July
item.description:
Car is parked dangerously on double yellow lines, is causing major traffic flow issues at a busy junction. Has been parked like this for at least two days now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Fen Grove, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
